metodos.codigoOriginal: Report Form SigReCnd To Print Prompt NoConsole

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector', ThisForm.Name)

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)
		=DoDefault()
	Else
		=Messagebox('Impossível Efetuar Conexão Com o Servidor de Banco de Dados...', 0+48, 'CreateObject')
		Return .f.
	EndIf
EndWith
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Private pDtR

ldDat = ThisForm.cntLocal.getDtInicial.Value
lcGru = Padr(ThisForm.cntLocal.getGrupo.Value, 10)
lcCon = Padr(ThisForm.cntLocal.getConta.Value, 10)
lcMoe = Padr(ThisForm.cntLocal.getMoeda.Value, 03)

lcTit = ThisForm.Caption
lcSub = 'Data Referência : ' + Dtoc(ldDat) + ' - ' + ;
		'Grupo : ' + Alltrim(lcGru) + ' - ' + ;
		'Conta : ' + Iif(Empty(lcCon), 'Todas', Alltrim(lcCon))
ThisForm.poDataMgr.CursorQuery('SigCdEmp', 'crSigCdEmp', 'Cemps', _Empr, 'Razas')
lcCep = Alltrim(_Empr) + ... [TRUNCADO]

If (This.Value <> 4) && Se Não Clicou em Saída
	If Empty(ThisForm.cntLocal.getDtInicial.Value)
		=Messagebox('Data de Referência Inválida!!!', 0+48, '')
		ThisForm.cntLocal.getDtInicial.SetFocus
		Return 0
	EndIf

	If Empty(ThisForm.cntLocal.getGrupo.Value)
		=Messagebox('Grupo Inválido!!!', 0+48, '')
		ThisForm.cntLocal.getGrupo.SetFocus
		Return 0
	EndIf

	If Empty(ThisForm.cntLocal.getMoeda.Value)
		=Messagebox('Moeda Inválida!!!', 0+48, '')
		ThisForm.cntLocal.getMoeda.SetFocus
		Return 0
	E... [TRUNCADO]

Grupo = ThisForm.cntLocal.GetGrupo.Value
If Not Empty(This.Value)
	If Not fAcessoContas(Usuar, Grupo, 'D', This.Value, ThisForm.cntLocal.GetConta, This, ThisForm.poDataMgr)
		=Messagebox('Acesso Negado!!!', 48, '')
		This.Value = ''
		This.Refresh
		ThisForm.cntLocal.GetConta.Value = ''
		ThisForm.cntLocal.GetConta.Refresh
	EndIf
Else
	ThisForm.cntLocal.GetConta.Value = ''
	ThisForm.cntLocal.GetConta.Refresh
EndIf
* Fim ****************************************************************************... [TRUNCADO]

Local llRet

llRet = .t.
If Not Empty(This.Value)
	llRet = fAcessoContab(Usuar, 'D', This.Value, ThisForm.cntLocal.GetGrupo, This, ThisForm.poDataMgr)
Else
	ThisForm.cntLocal.GetGrupo.Value = ''
	ThisForm.cntLocal.GetGrupo.Refresh
EndIf
Return llRet
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Grupo = This.Parent.GetGrupo.Value
If Not Empty(This.Value)
	If Not fAcessoContas(Usuar, Grupo, 'C', This.Value, This, ThisForm.cntLocal.GetDConta, ThisForm.poDataMgr)
		=Messagebox('Acesso Negado!!!', 48, '')
		This.Value = ''
		This.Refresh
		ThisForm.cntLocal.GetDConta.Value = ''
		ThisForm.cntLocal.GetDConta.Refresh
		Return 0
	EndIf
Else
	ThisForm.cntLocal.GetDConta.Value = ''
	ThisForm.cntLocal.GetDConta.Refresh
	Return .t.
EndIf
* Fim ******************************************************... [TRUNCADO]

Local llRet

llRet = .t.
If Not Empty(This.Value)
	llRet = fAcessoContab(Usuar, 'C', This.Value, This, ThisForm.cntLocal.GetDGrupo, ThisForm.poDataMgr)
Else
	ThisForm.cntLocal.GetDGrupo.Value = ''
	ThisForm.cntLocal.GetDGrupo.Refresh
EndIf

Return llRet
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Local loLista

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	loLista = CreateObject('fwBuscaExt', ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCdMoe', ;
						   'crListaRemota', 'CMoes', This.Value, 'Seleção', .t.)

	If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
		loLista.mAddColuna('CMoes', '', 'Código')
		loLista.mAddColuna('DMoes', '', 'Descrição')
		loLista.Show()
	EndIf
	
	ThisForm.cntLocal.getMoeda.Value  = crListaRemota.CMoes

Local loLista

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	loLista = CreateObject('fwBuscaExt', ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCdMoe', ;
						   'crListaRemota', 'DMoes', This.Value, 'Seleção', .t.)

	EndIf
